visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman with long black hair, wearing a black cat-ear headband and a black camisole. She is looking down at a purple smartphone in her hands. The background is a simple indoor setting with a white wall and a bed behind her. There are pink floral graphic overlays at the top and bottom of the frame, with large white text. (2) The camera remains static at eye level as she looks up towards the camera and then back at her phone, speaking directly to the audience. She makes subtle hand gestures while holding the phone. Small pink heart graphics float upwards on the screen as she smiles and waves slightly. (3) She continues her narration, occasionally looking puzzled with digital question mark symbols appearing around her head. An image of an owl in flight is overlaid in the upper right quadrant of the screen for several seconds. The lighting is bright and even, typical of indoor home lighting. (4) Toward the end, she points towards the screen with her right hand while still holding the phone in her left. More text overlays appear as she switches to a different question from her fans. The video ends with her looking into the lens with a slightly confused yet playful expression.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 粉絲Q&A. [Slogan]: 完整影片請到我的頻道觀看. [Logo]: YouTube 淑芬不受控. (2) [Subtitle]: 要怎麼才能當淑芬的男朋友. (3) [Subtitle]: 呃... [Subtitle]: 你們可以不要發鳥照給我嗎.. [Subtitle]: 可以發自拍照啊. [Subtitle]: 相親的個人資料也可以發給我啊. (4) [Subtitle]: 我真的搞不懂那些發鳥照的人什麼意思. [Subtitle]: 真的會有人看到. (5) [Subtitle]: 哇這隻鳥我很喜歡. [Subtitle]: 我好想跟他談戀愛哦. [Subtitle]: 會有嗎. [Subtitle]: 真的嗎. [Subtitle]: 真的會有嗎. (6) [Subtitle]: 身材是天生遺傳的嗎.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator speaking to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, wearing a black cat-ear headband and a black spaghetti-strap camisole.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A white wall with a soft bed and pillows visible behind the main character; decorative pink floral and heart graphics are overlaid.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A clear female voice begins speaking in Mandarin with a cheerful and engaging tone. The background features a mid-tempo, upbeat electronic pop track with a steady synthesizer rhythm. (2) As she asks a question, her pitch rises slightly to indicate inquiry. Subtle cartoon-style 'pop' sound effects occur when graphics appear on screen. The vocal delivery remains consistent and articulate. (3) She expresses confusion through a softer vocal tone and minor pauses. The BGM continues uninterrupted, providing a playful atmosphere. (4) The speech rate increases slightly as she addresses more fan comments, ending with a warm and conversational closing sentence.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Interaction -> Reaction -> Next Question
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The creator engages in a Q&A session with her fans, specifically addressing a recurring joke or confusing behavior regarding images of birds being sent to her. She uses humor and a friendly persona to build community rapport.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media short-form editing with bright overlays to maintain high engagement.
